Container.Name: K-Sorter
Container.Overview: K-Sorter calmly sorts a folder of K-pop videos into correctly-named group (and member) folders. Confident matches are sorted automatically; anything uncertain waits for a quick confirmation. Korean names, nicknames and former members are all handled, collabs go to a Special Stages folder, suspected duplicates are flagged (never deleted), and every move can be undone.
Container.Description: Calm, accurate K-pop video sorter. Point it at a messy folder and a destination; it does the rest. See the GitHub project for details.

Config.Name: Media
Config.Description: Your media share. Source and destination folders should live under here so moves stay fast (same filesystem).

Config.Name: Watch folder (optional)
Config.Description: Auto-sort new videos dropped here (confident matches only). e.g. /media/_watch

Config.Name: Watch destination (optional)
Config.Description: Where watch-folder videos are sorted into. e.g. /media/K-Pop

Config.Name: Verify checksum (optional)
Config.Description: Extra paranoia: SHA-256 verify cross-disk moves (slower).
